name: Shrimp and Asparagus Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook green asparagus in boiling salted water until barely tender, about 1 minute. If purple asparagus is tender, don't cook at all.
2. In a mixing bowl, combine asparagus, shrimp and bell pepper.
3. In another bowl, mix mayonnaise, parsley, pepper, celery seed, salt, horseradish and lemon juice; stir into shrimp mixture.
4. Spoon the salad onto endive or lettuce leaves.
5. Sprinkle with diced hard-cooked eggs and garnish with lemon wedges.
